notes: Free license activation — TomoAnalysis Viewer is now available for free (online, offline, and paid license activation supported)
Multiple viewing modes — 2D/3D View, Ortho View, Multi View, and Synced Control for flexible data inspection
Data Navigation — Browse, organize, and filter datasets with Favorites, Tags, and merged HT/FL thumbnail previews
Quantitative readouts — Line measurement, Histogram, Intensity plot, and Area plot for quick data assessment
Auto-update notification — Automatic version check with download link when a newer version is available (online only)
